channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed

- More tankers come under attack as US-Iran conflict spreads in the region

item.title: Which Kurdish groups is the US rallying to fight Iran?

item.title: Berlin jails man for 13 years over stabbing at Holocaust memorial
item.source: South China Morning Post (+6 other sources)
item.description:

- Refugee Sentenced to 13 Years for Stabbing at Berlin Holocaust Memorial

item.title: UN refugee agency says over 330,000 displaced by hostilities in Middle East, beyond
